# CWE-426 negative: plugins loaded from fixed directory only (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-426-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"path/filepath"
	"plugin"
	"strings"
)

const trustedPluginRoot = "/opt/slopguard/plugins"

func LoadExtension(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	name := filepath.Base(r.PathValue("name"))
	if strings.Contains(name, "..") {
		http.Error(w, "invalid plugin name", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	modPath := filepath.Join(trustedPluginRoot, name+".so")
	p, err := plugin.Open(modPath)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	sym, err := p.Lookup("Init")
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, fmt.Sprintf("lookup failed: %v", err), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_ = sym
}
